entry.title: sauerkraut recipe
entry.summary: Sauerkraut recipe for Week 26, 2023. Ingredients 2453g cabbage 674g carrot 252g apple 450g celeriac (forgot to weigh it, so this is a guess) 1 packet of sauerkraut seasoning 0.
